title: Rapid Technology Assessment: Robotics
body: "This report is a summary of a project completed in February 2025 (information cut-off date December 2024). This report provides an introduction to robotics, recent developments, opportunities, and challenges identified through research and discussions with a range of experts.  We would like to thank the following for their contribution and expert review:     Dr Ingo Keller, The National Robotarium    Prof Ron Petrick    Prof Kaspar Althoefer, Queen Mary University of London    Prof Nick Hawes    Dr Esyin Chew, EUREKA Robotics Centre Cardiff School of Technologies    Dr Carl Strathearn, Edinburgh Napier University    Prof Subramanian Ramamoorthy, University of Edinburgh    Prof Gopal Ramchurn    Prof James Marshall    Prof Pietro Valdastri    Dr James Law    Dr  Swen E. Gaudl, University of Gothenburg    Rich Walker, Shadow Robot    Matimba Swana    Professor Nathan Lepora    Dr Paul Bremner     Dr Antonia Tzemanaki     Dr Ruth Aylett    Dr Zaki Hussein, Touchlab    Samia Nefti-Meziani (OBE)    Dr Francesco Nori    Prof Elizabeth Sklar, University of Lincoln   Chris Gray, CMR Surgical    Alex Pejacsevich & Dominic Keen, Britbots   UKAEA    ARIA    NHS    NICE    EPSRC    DSIT    "
